zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Pilkington於大約1367年出生時，她的父親Roger de Pilkington III43歲，母親Ann Savage41歲。她於大約1380年與Sir John Dalton jr在英國藍卡爾比斯法姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1406年1月2日在英國藍卡爾可諾福斯利享年40歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾可諾福斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Pilkington于大约1367年出生时，她的父亲Roger de Pilkington III43岁，母亲Ann Savage41岁。她于大约1380年与Sir John Dalton jr在英国藍卡爾比斯法姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1406年1月2日在英国藍卡爾可諾福斯利享年40岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾可諾福斯利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pilkington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): habitational name from a place in Lancashire. The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Pīleca or Pīloc + patronymic -ing + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The surname is established in Ireland, where its presence was first recorded in the early 15th century.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Pilkington was born about 1367, her father, Roger de Pilkington III, was 43 and her mother, Ann Savage, was 41. She married Sir John Dalton jr about 1380, in Bispham, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 2 January 1406, in Knowsley, Lancashire, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Knowsley, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Pilkington est née environ 1367, son père, Roger de Pilkington III, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Ann Savage, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Dalton jr environ 1380, à Bispham, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 janvier 1406, à Knowsley, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Knowsley, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Pilkington um 1367 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Pilkington III 43 und ihre Mutter Ann Savage 41. Sie hat um 1380 in Bispham, Lancashire, England Sir John Dalton jr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. Januar 1406 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Knowsley, Lancashire, England und wurde in Knowsley, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Pilkington è nata il circa 1367, sua padre, Roger de Pilkington III, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Ann Savage, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Dalton jr circa 1380, nel Bispham, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 gennaio 1406, nel Knowsley, Lancashire, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Knowsley, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Pilkingtonが約1367年に生まれた時，父Roger de Pilkington IIIは43歳，母Ann Savageは41歳であった。約1380年にイギリスランカシュアイアビスファムでSir John Dalton jrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1406年1月2日にイギリスランカシュアイアノウスリーで40歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアノウスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Pilkington(이)가 대략 1367년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Pilkington III(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Savage(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 영국 랭카실르 비스프아에서 Sir John Dalton jr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1406년 1월 2일 영국 랭카실르 노우슬리에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 노우슬리에 묻혔다.

mn.Lathom, Ormskirk, Lancashire, UK: Lathom, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Pilkington nasceu aproximadamente 1367, seu pai, Roger de Pilkington III, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Ann Savage, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Dalton jr aproximadamente 1380, em Bispham, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1406, em Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Pilkington родилась около 1367 г., её отцу по имени Roger de Pilkington III было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Ann Savage, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Dalton jr около 1380 г. в местности бисфам, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 января 1406 г. в местности ноусли, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности ноусли, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Pilkington nació aproximadamente 1367, su papá, Roger de Pilkington III, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Ann Savage, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Sir John Dalton jr aproximadamente 1380, en Bispham, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de enero de 1406, en Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
